executives.name: John W. Ketchum
executives.background: Mr. Ketchum is Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of NextEra Energy and chairman of NextEra Energy Partners, LP. He previously served as president and CEO of NextEra Energy Resources, LLC and as CFO of NextEra Energy.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Kirk S. Hachigian
executives.background: Mr. Hachigian is the Lead Independent Director of NextEra Energy. He is the retired chairman, president and CEO of JELD-WEN Holding, Inc. and former chairman and CEO of Cooper Industries plc.

executives.name: Brian J. Bolster
executives.background: Mr. Bolster is Executive Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer of NextEra Energy. Prior to joining NextEra Energy, he was managing director and global head of natural resources investment banking at Goldman Sachs.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Rebecca J. Kujawa
executives.background: Ms. Kujawa is President, NextEra Energy Resources, LLC. She previously served as executive vice president, finance and CFO of NextEra Energy and as vice president, business management for NextEra Energy Resources.

executives.name: Armando Pimentel, Jr.
executives.background: Mr. Pimentel is President and Chief Executive Officer of Florida Power & Light Company. He previously served as president and CEO of NextEra Energy Resources and as CFO of NextEra Energy.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer, Florida Power & Light Company

executives.name: Charles E. Sieving
executives.background: Mr. Sieving is Executive Vice President and General Counsel of NextEra Energy. He is responsible for the legal, corporate secretary, and compliance functions.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: John W. Ketchum
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, President and CEO of NextEra Energy. Joined the board in 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Sherry S. Barrat
board_of_directors.background: Retired vice chairman of Northern Trust Corporation. Director since 1998.

board_of_directors.name: James L. Camaren
board_of_directors.background: Former chairman and CEO of Utilities, Inc. Director since 2002.

board_of_directors.name: Kenneth B. Dunn
board_of_directors.background: Professor of Financial Economics at Carnegie Mellon University. Director since 2010.

board_of_directors.name: Naren K. Gursahaney
board_of_directors.background: Former president and CEO of ADT Corporation. Director since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Kirk S. Hachigian
board_of_directors.background: Retired chairman, president and CEO of JELD-WEN Holding, Inc. Director since 2013.

board_of_directors.name: Amy B. Lane
board_of_directors.background: Retired managing director of Merrill Lynch & Co., Inc. Director since 2015.

board_of_directors.name: Geoffrey S. Martha
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Medtronic plc. Director since 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Darryl L. Wilson
board_of_directors.background: Founder, chairman and president of The Wilson Collective. Director since 2022.

sources.source_description: NextEra Energy, Inc. DEF 14A Proxy Statement
